positive: A vibrant, whimsical illustration of a mystical woodland creature—a neon forest faun—perched playfully on large, bioluminescent toadstools. The faun has an ethereal glow and iridescent fur, surrounded by stylized oversized flora like fern fronds and curled vines that glow with complementary colors. The style is modern vector illustration mixed with detailed tattoo art, featuring thick, confident outlines and strong graphic shapes. The composition should be centered and highly symmetrical, emphasizing the faun and the toadstools as the focal point. Color palette: electric blues, vibrant magentas, deep emerald greens, and acid yellows, set against a dark, forest backdrop. High contrast, clean silhouettes, perfect for apparel printing, isolated on a solid background for printing versatility.
